titles.en: Punishment of supporting the murder of a believer with a few words
Punishment of supporting the murder of a believer with a few words

segments: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ سَعِیدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِی عُمَیْرٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی غَیْرُ وَاحِدٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ أَعَانَ عَلَی قَتْلِ مُؤْمِنٍ بِشَطْرِ کَلِمَهٍ جَاءَ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ بَیْنَ عَیْنَیْهِ مَکْتُوبٌ آیِسٌ مِنْ رَحْمَهِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَی.
arabic.text: حَدَّثَنِی مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ الْحَسَنِ الصَّفَّارُ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنِ الْحَسَنِ بْنِ سَعِیدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِی عُمَیْرٍ قَالَ حَدَّثَنِی غَیْرُ وَاحِدٍ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع قَالَ: مَنْ أَعَانَ عَلَی قَتْلِ مُؤْمِنٍ بِشَطْرِ کَلِمَهٍ جَاءَ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ بَیْنَ عَیْنَیْهِ مَکْتُوبٌ آیِسٌ مِنْ رَحْمَهِ اللَّهِ تَعَالَی.

segments: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Ahmad b. Muhammad from al-Hassan b. Sa’eed from Muhammad b. Abi ’Umayr who said it was narrated to me by more than one person from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who supports the murder of a believer by speaking a few words, will appear on the Day of Judgment having a forehead on which it will be written: This person is deprived of Divine mercy.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 1. It was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan who said it was narrated to me by Muhammad b. al-Hassan al-Saffar from Ahmad b. Muhammad from al-Hassan b. Sa’eed from Muhammad b. Abi ’Umayr who said it was narrated to me by more than one person from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) who said: “One who supports the murder of a believer by speaking a few words, will appear on the Day of Judgment having a forehead on which it will be written: This person is deprived of Divine mercy.”

titles.en: Punishment of supporting the murder of a believer with a few words

segments: حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ سَعِیدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِی عُمَیْرٍ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع أَوْ عَمَّنْ ذَکَرَهُ عَنْهُ قَالَ: یَجِی ءُ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ رَجُلٌ إِلَی رَجُلٍ حَتَّی یُلَطِّخَهُ بِدَمٍ فَیَقُولُ یَا عَبْدَ اللَّهِ مَا لَکَ وَ لِی فَیَقُولُ أَعَنْتَ عَلَیَّ یَوْمَ کَذَا وَ کَذَا بِکَلِمَهِ کَذَا فَقُتِلْتُ.
arabic.text: حَدَّثَنِی سَعْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ بْنِ مُحَمَّدٍ عَنْ أَحْمَدَ عَنِ الْحُسَیْنِ بْنِ سَعِیدٍ عَنْ مُحَمَّدِ بْنِ أَبِی عُمَیْرٍ عَنْ حَمَّادِ بْنِ عُثْمَانَ عَنْ أَبِی عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ع أَوْ عَمَّنْ ذَکَرَهُ عَنْهُ قَالَ: یَجِی ءُ یَوْمَ الْقِیَامَهِ رَجُلٌ إِلَی رَجُلٍ حَتَّی یُلَطِّخَهُ بِدَمٍ فَیَقُولُ یَا عَبْدَ اللَّهِ مَا لَکَ وَ لِی فَیَقُولُ أَعَنْتَ عَلَیَّ یَوْمَ کَذَا وَ کَذَا بِکَلِمَهِ کَذَا فَقُتِلْتُ.

segments: 2. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ahmad b. Muhammad from Ahmad from al-Hussain b. Sa’eed from Muhammad b. Abi ’Umayr from Hamad b. Uthman from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) or from the one who mentioned it to him who said: Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) narrates that while accounting of deeds will be going on, a person will come forward and soak another person in blood. He will be asked the reason for doing so. He will reply, “On so and so day he had spoken a few words due to which I was murdered.”
en.sayed-athar-husain-rizvi-&-sayed-maqs.text: 2. My father (rah) said: it was narrated to me by Sa’d b. Abdillah from Ahmad b. Muhammad from Ahmad from al-Hussain b. Sa’eed from Muhammad b. Abi ’Umayr from Hamad b. Uthman from Abi Abdillah (a.s.) or from the one who mentioned it to him who said: Imam Ja’far Sadiq (a.s.) narrates that while accounting of deeds will be going on, a person will come forward and soak another person in blood. He will be asked the reason for doing so. He will reply, “On so and so day he had spoken a few words due to which I was murdered.”
